import numpy as np

def system_dynamics(t, x, u):
    # AUV pitch and depth dynamics (heave-pitch coupled model)
    # States: q (pitch rate, rad/s), theta (pitch angle, rad), z (depth positive down, m)
    # Input: fs (stern plane deflection angle, rad)
    
    q     = x[0]
    theta = x[1]
    z     = x[2]
    
    fs = u[0]
    
    Iy = 469.0
    Mq_added = -458.0
    Mfs = -1575.9
    Mq_damp = 9826.2
    Mtheta = 13719.6
    mu1 = 20.0
    
    Iy_eff = Iy - Mq_added
    
    q_dot = -(Mq_damp * q + Mtheta * theta + Mfs * fs) / Iy_eff
    
    theta_dot = q
    z_dot = mu1 * theta
    
    return np.array([q_dot, theta_dot, z_dot])
system_description: Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) pitch and depth dynamics with stern plane control
control_objective: Design a depth control system to regulate the AUV depth with minimal settling time, overshoot, and steady-state error
